coach_note: Welcome back, Claire. After your sub-3:45 London Marathon and full May recovery, we're rebuilding aerobically over 16 weeks with a focus on shorter events — 5K through to a Gosport HM in November. The structure is Lorcan-style: Tuesday 30/30 fartlek every week (the staple sharpening session), Friday alternates between HM-pace mediums and 30K-pace longs, Sunday is the long run. 4 days/week in June stepping to 5 in July. We'll race four 5Ks and a 10K through the build, then sharpen for Fleet 10K (25 Oct) and Gosport HM (15 Nov). Volume ramps 30km → 70km over 16 weeks. Sub-threshold quality stays at 14-18% of weekly total — well within the Norwegian Singles guideline.

predictions.rationale: First race off four weeks of rebuilding from May recovery. Aerobic fitness from London still present; this is a fitness check, not a peak effort.
Four extra weeks of structured 30/30 work plus sub-threshold mediums should sharpen turnover noticeably.
Coming off the highest training-load block to date (Wk 9-11 at 55-60km). 30K-pace mediums building specific endurance.
Post-peak (W15 at 68km). Should be Claire's fastest 5K of the block.
Beyond planned window — predictions to be refined after W16 and the late-Sep 5K result.
Goal race. Beyond planned window. Predictions to firm up after Fleet 10K. Flat fast course — well-suited to a PB attempt.
